semantic.role: Infrastructure utility providing a foldable output wrapper for CLI console logs, enabling collapsible sections in interactive terminals.
responsibilities: Wraps asynchronous actions to fold their console output into a single line with a blinking indicator.
Provides fallback behavior for non-TTY or CI environments to avoid ANSI escape issues.
Allows user to press SPACE to expand and see the full log output in real-time.
outOfScope: This module does not handle logging to files or external services.
This module does not format log messages; it delegates to `util.format` and `console` methods.
This module does not replace the global console; it only wraps specific actions.
invariants: The module must only be used as a wrapper for specific actions; it does not replace the global console.
The module behaves correctly in non-TTY and CI environments by falling back to standard console output.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable pattern for CLI commands to have foldable output, reducing visual noise in interactive terminals.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored to use ANSI escape sequences for blinking indicator and raw stdin for SPACE key detection; added CI detection via environment variables.

publicSurface.description: Executes an asynchronous action, folding its console output into a single line with a blinking indicator. Pressing SPACE expands the output in real-time. Falls back to normal console output when not a TTY or in CI.

English.role: Infrastructure utility providing a foldable output wrapper for CLI console logs, enabling collapsible sections in interactive terminals.

Provides fallback behavior for non-TTY or CI environments to avoid ANSI escape issues.
Allows user to press SPACE to expand and see the full log output in real-time.
outOfScope: This module does not handle logging to files or external services.
This module does not format log messages; it delegates to `util.format` and `console` methods.
This module does not replace the global console; it only wraps specific actions.

exports.name: runWithFoldableOutput
exports.signature:
runWithFoldableOutput(
  action: () => Promise<T>,
  options: { fallbackMessage?: string; label?: string } = {},
)
